home.villasSubheading: One quiet road near the water.

0.title: An island you can drive onto.
0.body: The only Ionian island connected to the mainland — a slim causeway, then thirty kilometres of mountain spine, and the sea on every side. Pine forests fall toward white-stone beaches; villages keep their hours by the bell.

1.title: A sea the colour of memory.
1.body: Seven islands rise from it — Corfu, Paxos, Lefkada, Ithaca, Kefalonia, Zakynthos, Kythira. The water is clearer than anywhere else in Greece. Sailors from Odysseus onward have known it as a kinder sea.

2.title: Where Homer's hero longed to come home.
2.body: Some say Lefkada is the true Ithaca of the Odyssey. Whether or not, these waters carry the same myth — a man, a ship, the slow turn of the sea, and the green hill of home rising at last from the horizon.

rates.heading: Rates
rates.subheading: Weekly and nightly from April through October.
